### `.`

Helpers for working with dates, described above the table of exports.

| Export                   | Description                       |
| ------------------------ | --------------------------------- |
| [`format`](index.js#L10) | Formats a date as an ISO string.  |
| [`parse`](index.js#L17)  | Parses an ISO string into a date. |
